7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 
9 ItemConnectionGroupPartitionConstraint::
10 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
11 ItemConnectionGroupPartitionConstraint(Arcane::IGraph2* graph, ArcGeoSim::ItemConnectionGroup my_cell_cell_connections)
12  : m_graph(graph)
13  , m_my_cell_cell_connections(my_cell_cell_connections)
14 #else
15 ItemConnectionGroupPartitionConstraint(ArcGeoSim::ItemConnectionGroup my_cell_cell_connections)
16  : m_my_cell_cell_connections(my_cell_cell_connections)
17 #endif
18 {
19 
20  ENUMERATE_CONNECTION(iconnection,m_my_cell_cell_connections)
21  {
22  ArcGeoSim::ItemConnection connection = *iconnection;
23 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
24  const Arcane::Item& first_item = connection.first(m_graph);
25  const Arcane::Item& second_item = connection.second(m_graph);
26 #else
27  const Arcane::Item& first_item = connection.first();
28  const Arcane::Item& second_item = connection.second();
29 #endif
30  m_linked_cells.add(first_item.uniqueId().asInteger());
31  m_linked_cells.add(second_item.uniqueId().asInteger());
32  m_linked_owners.add(first_item.owner());
33  }
34 }
35 
36 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
37 
38 void
39 ItemConnectionGroupPartitionConstraint::
40 addLinkedCells(Int64Array& linked_cells,Int32Array& linked_owners)
41 {
42  linked_cells.addRange(m_linked_cells);
43  linked_owners.addRange(m_linked_owners);
44 
45 }
